prompt: Create an ultra-realistic low-angle 35mm studio fashion portrait of a stylish male model standing confidently in a monochromatic pastel peach cube room. The camera looks upward from waist level, vertical 9:16 composition, with the model centered and cropped around the upper thighs to head area. The room has sharp geometric architecture: peach walls, ceiling, and floor forming a cube-like corner, with large triangular sliced-panel facets across the walls and ceiling. Add exactly three visible glowing soft-white linear light strips: one diagonal strip along the ceiling from upper left toward center, one diagonal strip on the left wall rising from mid-left to the center, and one diagonal strip on the right wall rising from mid-right to the center, creating a luminous X-like background. The model wears a crisp open-collar ivory dress shirt tucked into high-waisted wide-leg cream trousers, plus a tailored blazer with a bold abstract camouflage-style pattern in teal blue, burnt orange, ivory, and beige. Pose him with relaxed shoulders, one hand in a trouser pocket and the other arm hanging naturally, projecting high-fashion editorial confidence. Use glossy polished studio lighting, soft reflections, clean shadows, realistic fabric texture, accurate tailoring details, and warm peach color grading. The model’s face is covered by a centered soft-edged rectangular blur in a warm brown skin-tone color, while dark styled hair remains visible above it. Include a small four-point sparkle/star mark in the lower-right corner. No text, no logos, no extra people, no props.
